text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to the ability of machines and computers to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being directly programmed for every step. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses complex structures called neural networks to analyze large amounts of data. AI is already part of our daily lives in many ways. For example, it powers recommendations on streaming services, virtual assistants on smartphones, and even helps doctors diagnose diseases. These technologies continue to improve and become more common.
